data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of being weather-dependent with a cancellation policy. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that the cancellation policy is effectively implemented for weather conditions, as it only mentions rescheduling or refunds in the case of severe weather. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the specific implementation details of the cancellation policy in relation to weather conditions are not sufficiently documented.
gaps: The evidence does not confirm the specific implementation of the weather-dependent cancellation policy.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define cancellation policy details
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the cancellation policy includes specific provisions for weather-related cancellations.
